case_title: MARSHALL FELDMAN et al VS. OK INVESTMENTS INC.

docket_entries.description: DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT OK INVESTMENTS INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FELDMAN, MARSHALL RICHARDS, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OK INVESTMENTS INC. $1,795.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,870.00, ANY PREVIOUS PARTIAL REFUND OF PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT ( IF ACCEPTED BY PLAINTIFF) SHALL BE CREDITED TO THIS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-17-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT DATED MAY 22, 2008. PARTIES MUST GO TO COURT IF THEY WANT TO BE HEARD. HEARING DATE SET FOR JUNE 20, 2008@ 3:30PM.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. "THE COURT REQUESTS FURTHER INFORMATION CONCERNING THE DATES OF THE PAYMENTS IN SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT". HEARING SET FOR JUN-20-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-01-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OK INVESTMENTS INC.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF FELDMAN, MARSHALL RICHARDS, JENNIFER ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,277.00 FILED BY FELDMAN, MARSHALL RICHARDS, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT OK INVESTMENTS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT OK INVESTMENTS INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2008 - JUDGMENT.
HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. FILED BY OK INVESTMENTS INC. IS GRANTED. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, DEPT. 506)
